links.source_location: Run /company-git first if not a git repo
HANDOFF.md is the source of truth
Band midpoints S/M/L/XL in data parsing
Update kanban — note diagnosis and fix in ticket
Create kanban tickets for overdue flags
/company-add runs this skill silently as its final write step
Run /forge-init to regenerate CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md after update
Run /forge-install to migrate to junction-based model first
git pull updates all framework files via junction
Phase 3: Compile answers into format defined in FORMATS.md
Failure Modes - style guide not found
Ideas section - Jira ID in page title
PIR storage uses PROJ and PI IDs
